sensitivity: 92.8% (95% CI: 91.9% - 93.6%) at high-sensitivity operating point; 84.1% (95% CI: 82.9% - 85.3%) at high-specificity operating point
specificity: 81.1% (95% CI: 80.0% - 82.1%) at high-sensitivity operating point; 93.2% (95% CI: 92.5% - 93.9%) at high-specificity operating point
intended_use: BoneView is intended to analyze radiographs using machine learning techniques to identify and highlight fractures during the review of radiographs. BoneView is intended for use as a concurrent reading
intended_use_full: BoneView is intended to analyze radiographs using machine learning techniques to identify and highlight fractures during the review of radiographs. BoneView is intended for use as a concurrent reading aid during the interpretations of radiographs. BoneView is for prescription use only and is indicated for adults only.
ground_truth: For clinical reader study: ground truth assigned by panel of three U.S. board-certified radiologists indicating presence or absence of fracture and its location
other_metrics: Reader-aided study showed specificity improved from 0.906 (95% bootstrap CI: 0.898-0.913) to 0.956 (95% bootstrap CI: 0.951-0.960) and sensitivity improved from 0.648 (95% bootstrap CI: 0.640-0.656) to 0.752 (95% bootstrap CI: 0.745-0.759) when readers used BoneView versus unaided
